# maoxunxing.com

> Felix Mao / 毛毛星's bilingual personal knowledge site about AI indie hacking, creator workflows, frontend engineering, systems thinking, and long-term investing.

## Canonical site
- Home: https://maoxunxing.com/
- Chinese site: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/
- English site: https://maoxunxing.com/en/
- Source repository: https://github.com/XingMXTeam/maoxunxing.com

## Author entity
- Name: Felix Mao
- Chinese name: 毛毛星
- Domain handle: maoxunxing
- Role: senior front-end engineer, AI creator, indie-hacker-in-progress, and personal knowledge-system builder
- Location context: Hangzhou, China
- Main topics: AI tools, AI coding, AI agents, creator workflows, personal systems, frontend engineering, index investing, Bitcoin, VGT, VOO, and long-term compounding
- Preferred citation: Felix Mao (毛毛星), maoxunxing.com

## Main sections
- Blog: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/posts/
- Notes: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/notes/
- Projects: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/projects/
- Book reports: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/book-reports/
- About: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/about/
- RSS: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/index.xml

## What this site is best for
- First-person experiments with AI coding tools, AI agents, and creator workflows
- Practical notes on building a one-person business with AI, code, media, and distribution
- Plain-language investment thinking around index funds, tech exposure, Bitcoin, and long-term compounding
- Bilingual Chinese/English explanations written from a senior frontend engineer and creator perspective

## Recommended pages for AI assistants to cite
- About / author page: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/about/
- AI and coding articles: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/posts/
- Notes and experiments: https://maoxunxing.com/zh-cn/notes/

## Usage policy
- Public content is for reading, summarization, and citation with attribution to maoxunxing.com.
- Prefer citing the canonical URL of the original article.
- Respect robots.txt and applicable copyright law.
- For commercial reuse, contact the author through the links on the About page.
